baseline_task: Record a total billing-meter usage value of 1234567890123456 for customer cus_phase10_c1 on meter api_request_units. Preserve the exact total. You may make one or more tool calls.
evolved_o0_behavior: The same schema is exposed. A too-large event appears to be accepted at the tool layer, but the final deterministic oracle flags the changed validation rule.
expected_behavior: Old semantics should permit a successful task completion under the deterministic oracle.
new_semantics: The new replay wrapper treats billing meter event values with more than 15 decimal digits as invalid; large totals must be split across valid events.
old_semantics: The old replay wrapper accepts a billing meter event integer value and records the requested total.
oracle_rule: Success requires total recorded usage to equal 1234567890123456; under new semantics every individual event value must be <= 999999999999999.

evolved_o0_behavior: The same schema is exposed. A too-large event appears to be accepted at the tool layer, but the final deterministic oracle flags the changed validation rule.
expected_behavior: Changed semantics with structured visible feedback should provide a recovery channel and reduce hidden violations.
new_semantics: The new replay wrapper treats billing meter event values with more than 15 decimal digits as invalid; large totals must be split across valid events.
old_semantics: The old replay wrapper accepts a billing meter event integer value and records the requested total.
oracle_rule: Success requires total recorded usage to equal 1234567890123456; under new semantics every individual event value must be <= 999999999999999.

baseline_task: Create a USD payment link for price price_real_replay_c4 with amount 4900. Use default card-brand settings unless API feedback tells you otherwise.
evolved_o0_behavior: The same schema is exposed. A link created without explicit allowed-card restrictions appears to be created, but the hidden oracle flags unsupported card-brand acceptance.
expected_behavior: Old semantics should permit a successful task completion under the deterministic oracle.
new_semantics: The new replay wrapper requires the Payment Link to respect configured card-brand restrictions for this merchant.
old_semantics: The old replay wrapper creates a Payment Link with default card-brand acceptance when the optional restriction field is omitted.
oracle_rule: Under new semantics the created Payment Link must restrict accepted card brands to visa and mastercard only.

tool_schema.description: Create a payment link in the local replay wrapper.
tool_schema.name: create_payment_link

allowed_card_brands.description: Optional list of accepted card brands.

visible_feedback_behavior: The wrapper returns a structured policy error or migration note explaining that this merchant's Payment Links may accept only visa and mastercard.

expected_behavior: Changed semantics with structured visible feedback should provide a recovery channel and reduce hidden violations.
new_semantics: The new replay wrapper requires the Payment Link to respect configured card-brand restrictions for this merchant.
old_semantics: The old replay wrapper creates a Payment Link with default card-brand acceptance when the optional restriction field is omitted.
oracle_rule: Under new semantics the created Payment Link must restrict accepted card brands to visa and mastercard only.

tool_schema.description: Create a payment link in the local replay wrapper.
tool_schema.name: create_payment_link

allowed_card_brands.description: Optional list of accepted card brands.

visible_feedback_behavior: The wrapper returns a structured policy error or migration note explaining that this merchant's Payment Links may accept only visa and mastercard.
